name: Vanilla Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peanut butter and powdered sugar until crumbled.
2. Prepare the instant vanilla pudding according to package directions.
3. Spread most of the crumble on the bottom of the baked pie shell.
4. Pour the prepared pudding over the crust.
5. Cover with Cool Whip.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crumble over the top.
7. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
